title: Check if sitenav files are accessible on clung.us

log.context: Check if sitenav files are accessible on clung.us

Both `clung.us/sitenav.css` and `clung.us/sitenav.js` return HTTP 200. Message posted to Discord thread `1486952295642959954`.

Note: `website.service` unit file wasn't found via `systemctl --user cat` (likely served a different way), but the files are publicly accessible regardless.
